response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior/staff full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators), but falls well short of a Principal/Director-level IC bar. The role demands ~15 years of experience with recognized AI expertise and demonstrated AI products/platforms; the resume shows roughly 13-14 years post-degree, no advanced AI degree, no published AI products, and no evidence of advising strategic customers or shaping cloud/AI platform strategy at scale.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack background across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput services
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Strong craftsmanship signals: TDD, CI/CD, open-source platform (GISCollective), workshops and talks
concerns: No demonstrated AI products/platforms or recognized AI expertise required for the role
Career level is Senior/Staff IC, not Principal/Director-level with strategic advisory scope
Limited deep cloud-platform strategy experience; cloud work is mostly application-level (AWS CDK)

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI product/platform track record
Seniority gap vs. Principal/Director IC scope
Recent AI-agent and MCP tooling experience
